topic: whether Studio intake packets need one extra bounded readability hint for local review without implying a stronger destination
distilled_summary: the issue is still a bounded packet-shape design question inside the local review layer and should stay in manual design follow-up rather than escalate to a later human decision target
open_conflicts: some readers want one extra readability hint while others want to keep packet shape thinner to avoid pseudo-runtime drift
distillator_notes: Do not treat clearer packet wording as a reason for human escalation.
